extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against parties: all 'By' rows are nil and excluded; the 'Against' rows show 4 criminal proceedings against Directors, 2 statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company, and no regulatory matters against the other listed entities. Tax proceedings against the Company are 6 and against Subsidiaries are 5, totaling 11; the Promoters' one tax matter is excluded because it is personal. The quantified group litigation amount uses the stated aggregate amounts against the Company of ₹354.91 million and against Subsidiaries of ₹11.33 million, totaling ₹366.24 million; unquantifiable Director and Promoter amounts are excluded. Contingent liabilities use the stated consolidated bank-guarantees-outstanding figure of ₹3.91 million as of September 30, 2025. The top-five and top-ten customer figures are company-wide for Fiscal 2025, use revenue from operations as denominator, and are 43.35% and 58.71%, respectively. The source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10 (₹366.24 million = ₹36.624 crore; ₹3.91 million = ₹0.391 crore).
